title: list store

messages.description: concatenate incoming list with stored list and output (a bang is a zero element list and outputs stored list)
set stored list (a bang is a zero element list and clears it)
the stored list at bangs, the concatenated list at list input or sublists via 'get' message

methods.description: prepend a list to the stored list
append a list to the stored list
output an item (if only one float is given) or sublist, where first element sets staring index and the second sets ending index (-1 is end of the list)
set values starting at index from the first element
insert values before index from the first element
delete a given item for just one float or a number of items specified in the second element starting at index from the first element (-1 means delete all items from given index)
send stored list to a named receiver

body: put together or break apart a list to/from sublists
